sections.title: MCP Surfaces
sections.summary: Operator-facing entrypoints and expert control surfaces.

items.name: nexus_session_bootstrap
items.purpose: Recover session context, memory stats, catalog health, and next-step guidance.
items.notes: Default first call for non-trivial work.

items.name: nexus_orchestrate
items.purpose: Plan, select assets, execute through worktree-backed runtime, and persist truth.

items.name: nexus_plan_execution
items.purpose: Inspect the planner ledger before mutation.
items.notes: Used when operators want a pre-run ledger.

items.name: nexus_recall_memory / nexus_memory_stats / nexus_store_memory
items.purpose: Inspect and persist durable learnings.
items.notes: Feeds the memory fabric and handoff flow.

items.name: nexus_optimize_tokens
items.purpose: Inspect or override source-aware token budgeting.
items.notes: Manual/diagnostic surface; orchestration applies budgeting automatically.

items.name: nexus_mindkit_check / nexus_ghost_pass / nexus_spawn_workers
items.purpose: Run governance preflight, pre-read analysis, and explicit swarm control.

items.name: nexus_memory_export / import / backup / maintain / trace
items.purpose: Export, restore, maintain, and inspect local-first memory bundles.
items.notes: Supports backup/resume and OpenClaw-oriented bridge packs.

items.name: nexus_list_skills / workflows / hooks / automations / specialists / crews
items.purpose: Expose what the runtime can activate.
items.notes: Used for explicit operator control and diagnostics.

items.name: nexus_run_status / nexus_federation_status / nexus_session_dna
items.purpose: Inspect persisted run state, federation status, and handoff DNA.
items.notes: Used after execution or during operating-layer work.

sections.title: Client Bootstrap Targets
sections.summary: Client-native installation and bootstrap surfaces managed by Nexus Prime.

items.name: Codex
items.purpose: Writes a managed Nexus Prime block into repo-local AGENTS.md.

items.name: Cursor
items.purpose: Installs MCP config plus project-local .cursor/rules/nexus-prime.mdc.

items.name: Claude Code
items.purpose: Installs MCP config plus generated markdown bootstrap note.

items.name: Opencode
items.purpose: Installs config plus generated markdown bootstrap note.

items.name: Windsurf
items.purpose: Installs MCP config plus .windsurfrules.

items.name: Antigravity / OpenClaw
items.purpose: Installs MCP config plus split SKILL.md bundles sized to client limits.

sections.title: Dashboard Capabilities
sections.summary: What the topology console exposes from persisted runtime truth.

items.name: Overview
items.purpose: Runtime truth, lifetime token telemetry, graph-centered memory view, and system signals.

items.name: Knowledge
items.purpose: Session-first RAG workflow, provenance, source mix, and bootstrap manifest truth.
items.notes: Shows attached, retrieved, selected, and dropped context.

items.name: Runs
items.purpose: Execution topology, verifier traces, and event stream.

items.name: Catalog
items.purpose: Loaded assets, feature registry, and runtime-vs-available inventory.
items.notes: Separates what exists from what was used.

items.name: Governance
items.purpose: Guardrails, quarantine, federation health, and client bootstrap drift.

sections.title: Runtime Subsystems
sections.summary: Core architecture layers that shape execution, memory, and visibility.

items.name: Knowledge Fabric
items.purpose: Balances repo, memory, RAG, patterns, and runtime traces into one execution bundle.
items.notes: Feeds planner, packet, and worker context.

items.name: Memory Control Plane
items.purpose: Reconciles facts with add/update/merge/delete/quarantine semantics and vault projection.
items.notes: Local-first memory remains inspectable and portable.

items.name: Worktree Doctor
items.purpose: Prunes stale git worktree metadata and records worktree health ahead of execution.
items.notes: Protects nexus_orchestrate and verifier lanes from stale temp state.

items.name: Source-Aware Token Budget
items.purpose: Allocates token budget across repo, memory, RAG, patterns, and runtime traces.

items.name: Bootstrap Manifest Truth
items.purpose: Tracks configured client bootstrap artifacts independently from active heartbeats.
items.notes: Supports installed vs active truth in the dashboard.

items.name: Artifact Selection Audit
items.purpose: Explains why skills/workflows/crews/specialists were selected or rejected.

items.name: Bundled assets: 109 skills · 64 workflows · 5 hooks · 3 automations · 7 crews · 139 specialists
items.purpose: Summarizes the current bundled runtime inventory.
items.notes: Detailed lists live in the runtime catalog section and dashboard catalog view.

sections.title: Release Gates
sections.summary: Quality and security checks required before release.

items.name: Build + lint + tests
items.purpose: Compile, lint, and validate runtime/docs/public surfaces.

items.name: Package smoke
items.purpose: Verify npm packaging via dry-run before publish.

items.name: Dependency audit + SBOM
items.purpose: Track shipping dependency risk and document exceptions.

items.name: Workflow lint
items.purpose: Validate workflow syntax and release automation contracts.

items.name: Runtime smoke
items.purpose: Exercise MCP startup, setup-all bootstrap, and dashboard boot.
